title: Satta Bazaar
writer: Khwaja Ahmad Abbas, S.M. Abbas, G. Mohanial Dave
actors: Meena Kumari, Balraj Sahni, Johnny Walker
plot: Widower Ramesh lives a comfortable lifestyle with his daughter, Kala, but is advised to re-marry so that Kala can get the love and caring of a mother, so he re-marries Jamuna. But Kala hates Jamuna and will not even call her "Maa"...
